description: This file defines a BaseComponent class for Bootstrap, providing common functionality for UI components, including configuration management, event handling, and instance management.

classes.name: BaseComponent
classes.description: A base class for Bootstrap components that manages configuration, data association, and event handling.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Removes data and event handlers associated with the component, and clears its properties.

methods.name: _queueCallback
methods.description: Executes a callback after a transition, optionally animated.

methods.name: _getConfig
methods.description: Merges and validates the configuration object.

methods.name: getInstance
methods.description: Retrieves the existing instance associated with an element.

methods.name: getOrCreateInstance
methods.description: Retrieves the existing instance or creates a new one if none exists.

methods.name: VERSION
methods.description: Static getter returning the Bootstrap version.

methods.name: DATA_KEY
methods.description: Static getter returning the data key used for data storage.

methods.name: EVENT_KEY
methods.description: Static getter returning the event namespace key.

methods.name: eventName
methods.description: Generates a full event name with namespace.
